en: A: Is Ciwas home?
She’s at home, please come in.
A: Is Yageh home?

ab: ini aki sali, lalu yaw su?
en: B: She’s not here. What do you want?
B: Who is it?

ab: uba, Sayun kinang, gyahiy cikah lihun.
en: A: Grandpa, I’m Sayun, please open the door.
B: Who is it?

ab: Yabung, Rimuy kinang, nyu cu mwah hkani isu la.
en: A: Yabung, this is Rimuy, I’ve come to see you.

ab: bsya ta ci ini pkita la.
en: A: Long time no see.

ab: aw ha! krmatun misu ci. nahay uwah mtisan!
ch: B:是啊!我很想念你。快來聊天吧!
en: B:Yeah! I miss you so much. Come on, let’s chat!
B: Please sit down and have some tea.
A: Thank you.
B: Please have some tea.

ab: talagay! ble ci nbun ocya mamu.
en: A: Your tea is delicious.
B: Let’s eat fruit!

ab: aw ga! myasa ci texan kwara bbway hani.
ch: B:好喔!這些水果看起來很棒。
en: A: Yes! These fruits look great.
B: How is the fruit?
A:Yes, it’s really delicious.

ab: masu phapuy kgabi yaya la, nahay uwah mani!
ch: A:媽媽煮好晚餐了，快來吃吧!
en: B: Mom has cooked dinner, come and eat!
A: Okay, I’ll go wash my hands.

ab: iriy mani ru nbu, bali su c’oli.
ch: A:盡量吃喝，你又不是外人。
en: B: Try to eat and drink as much as possible, you’re not an outsider.

ab: piyux ci waya mu ni’un la, tngi ci la.
en: A: I ate a lot, I’m full.
B: Eat more, don’t be polite.
A:Well, it’s delicious.

ab: mosa cu la, wahay misu mita babaw nya.
ch: A:我要離開了，下次再來看你。
en: A: I’m leaving, I’ll see you next time.
B: Okay, goodbye.

ab: gbyan ci la, mosa cu sali la.
en: A: It’s late, I’m going home.
B:Come again next time!
B: Walk slowly and carefully.

ab: aw, ungat yaw su ga uwah tisan sali mu.
en: A: Okay, come to my house sometime.
